subject: A multi-headed hound (cerberus) lying down asleep, rendered in cool blue tones
description: A large, muscular three-headed hound lies stretched out on the ground in deep slumber, its multiple heads resting peacefully against rocky terrain. The whole composition is washed in cool blues and silver-whites, suggesting moonlight or dream-magic. The cerberus's bulk dominates the frame, paws and snouts at rest. Soft, ambient lighting and the absence of motion convey heavy sleep. The flavor text confirms 'Normally, a cerberus sleeps one head at a time.'
foreground: sleeping multi-headed hound on stony ground
background: shadowy rocks and indistinct dim cavern or nightscape
